name: Labyrinth
author: Neomabiloan

placementContext.reason: Labyrinth draws heavy inspiration from the Labyrinth of Suffering in Maplestory, translating its atmospheric and punishing aesthetic into a Top 5 contender difficulty.

description: Featuring an ethereal theme inspired by Maplestory, Labyrinth is a visually striking project that combines complex structural decoration with relentlessly difficult mechanical segments.
